item.title: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on my laptop drew me a better pelican than Claude Opus 4.7 摘要
item.description:
Simon Willison compares the latest Qwen3.6-35B-A3B and Claude Opus 4.7 models using his humorous 'pelican riding a bicycle' SVG generation benchmark. Qwen produces a more accurate bicycle frame and creative flamingo on a unicycle with sunglasses and flair, while Opus struggles with bicycle anatomy and delivers duller outputs. The author notes the benchmark, though absurd, has loosely correlated with model utility in the past, but this result breaks that trend, suggesting Qwen excels at this specific creative task despite likely being less powerful overall than Opus.
标签: AI, LLM, benchmark, generative AI, model comparison, Qwen, Claude, SVG generation, local LLMs, humor

item.title: Apple Pay Express Transit Mode, When Used With a Visa Card, Is Vulnerable to Scam Tap-to-Pay Readers 摘要
item.description:
A security vulnerability in Apple Pay's Express Transit Mode affects only Visa cards, not Mastercard or American Express, due to a Visa-specific loophole. The exploit requires an iPhone with Express Transit Mode enabled and a Visa card linked for payments, but is considered unlikely in real-world scenarios. The issue is attributed to Visa's system rather than Apple's, and users can mitigate risk by using non-Visa cards or disabling Express Transit Mode.
标签: security, Apple Pay, Visa, Express Transit Mode, mobile payments, iPhone, vulnerability, credit cards, tap-to-pay, fraud prevention

item.title: Chance Miller: ‘Netflix Ruined Its Apple TV App by Switching to a Custom Video Player’ 摘要
item.description:
Netflix recently updated its Apple TV app to use a custom video player instead of the native tvOS player, removing key features like playback controls via the iPhone Remote app, Enhance Dialogue, automatic subtitles on rewind, and episode end-time display. This change has sparked significant user backlash, with many subscribers threatening to cancel due to the loss of platform-specific functionalities. Critics argue that Netflix's move prioritizes cross-platform consistency and cost-saving over user experience, as Apple TV users chose the device for its unique features, which are now compromised.
标签: Netflix, Apple TV, tvOS, video player, user experience, regression, streaming, platform features, customer backlash, tech news

item.title: How to Format 10-Digit Phone Numbers 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses the AP Stylebook's 2024 update to format U.S. phone numbers as 212-621-1500, using hyphens instead of parentheses, and international numbers as 011-44-20-7535-1515. It criticizes the outdated (123) 555-1234 format, tracing it to when area codes were optional before 10-digit dialing became standard in the late 1990s. The author argues that since 7-digit dialing is obsolete, parentheses should be abolished, and calls for Apple's Contacts app to reformat numbers to the new style.
标签: AP Stylebook, phone numbers, formatting, typography, Apple Contacts, technology, communication, standards, history, user interface

item.title: llm-anthropic 0.25 摘要
item.description:
The llm-anthropic 0.25 release introduces Claude Opus 4.7 with xhigh thinking_effort support, new thinking_display and thinking_adaptive options for JSON output/logs, increased default max_tokens to model limits, and removal of obsolete structured-outputs beta headers for older models.
标签: llm, anthropic, claude, release, model-update, thinking-effort, json-output, max-tokens, beta-header, ai-tools

item.title: Colliding With Reality, Indeed 摘要
item.description:
The article critiques President Trump's portrayal of the Iran war as a success, arguing that his narrative is colliding with reality. It contrasts this with media coverage of Trump's erratic behavior and unhinged statements, noting that while the New York Times has finally started treating Trump critically, his bullshitting often flies in other contexts. The author asserts that war, unlike other crises, is bullshit-proof, making Trump's Iran crisis uniquely resistant to his usual tactics.
标签: politics, Trump, Iran war, media criticism, bullshitting, reality, crisis, New York Times, behavior, narrative

item.title: Here's What Agentic AI Can Do With Have I Been Pwned's APIs 摘要
item.description:
This article demonstrates how agentic AI, using tools like OpenClaw and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), can enhance Have I Been Pwned's APIs for practical security tasks. It shows examples like identifying breached employees in large organizations, analyzing stealer logs, monitoring accounts on a schedule, and generating data visualizations. The author highlights how AI makes these tasks accessible to non-technical users, enabling deeper insights into data breaches and security risks.
标签: AI, security, API, agentic AI, data breach, MCP, automation, privacy, cybersecurity, tools
